sqlMap.select:
select d.CN as id, IF(d.extensionattribute1=null
or d.CN=#companyId#
,'##',d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1) as parent, d.extensionattribute2 as companyId, d.DISPLAYNAME$lang$ as text, case d.CN when d.extensionattribute2 then 'comp' else 'dept' end as isComp, case d.CN when u.DEPARTMENT then 'yes' else 'no' end as myDept from tbl_deptmaster d left join tbl_usermaster u on d.tenant_id = u.TENANT_ID where d.tenant_id = #tenantId# and u.CN = #userId# and u.tenant_id = #tenantId# and ( ((substr(u.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 3, 1) = 0 and d.extensionattribute2 = u.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME)) or (substr(u.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 3, 1) = 1) )
and d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#
ORDER BY lpad(ifnull(d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 0), 6, 0), d.DISPLAYNAME$lang$

select d.CN as companyId, d.DISPLAYNAME$lang$ as companyName, case d.CN when #companyId# then 'selected' else 'no' end as selected from jmocha.tbl_deptmaster d left join jmocha.tbl_usermaster u on d.tenant_id = u.TENANT_ID where d.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and u.CN = #userId# and u.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and ( ((substr(u.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 3, 1) = 0 and d.extensionattribute2 = u.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME)) or (substr(u.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 3, 1) = 1) ) and d.extensionattribute2 = d.CN order by lpad(ifnull(d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 0), 6, 0), d.DISPLAYNAME$lang$

select DISPLAYNAME$lang$ as user_name, CN as user_id, TITLE$lang$ as jikwi, MAIL as mail, DESCRIPTION$lang$ as dept_name, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as user_img from tbl_usermaster where TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
and $key$ like concat('%',#value#,'%')
and $key$ = #value#
order by lpad(ifnull(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15,0),6,0) ,DISPLAYNAME$lang$
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO tbl_pms_project( tenant_id, project_name, plan_start_date, plan_end_date, real_start_date, head_manager_id, head_manager_name, head_manager_name2, head_manager_deptname, head_manager_deptname2, status, progress, overview, weight_input, creator_id, creator_name, creator_name2, creator_deptname, creator_deptname2, workingday, rest_dueday, alam_mail_status, create_date ) VALUES ( #tenantId#, #projectName#, #planStartDate#, #planEndDate#, #realStartDate#, #headManagerId#, #headManagerName#, #headManagerName2#, #headManagerDeptname#, #headManagerDeptname2#, #status#, #progress#, #overview#, #weightInput#, #creatorId#, #creatorName#, #creatorName2#, #creatorDeptname#, #creatorDeptname2#, #workingDay#, #restDueday#, #alamMailStatus#, #createDate# )
SELECT last_insert_id()
sqlMap.select: SELECT GROUP_ID AS id, UPPER_GROUP_ID AS parent, GROUP_NAME AS text, SORT_ORDER AS sort FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP WHERE PROJECT_ID = #project_Id# AND DEL_STATUS = 0
SELECT CONCAT('t',TASK_ID) AS id, GROUP_ID AS parent, TASK_NAME AS text, SORT_ORDER AS sort FROM TBL_PMS_TASK WHERE PROJECT_ID = #project_Id# AND DEL_STATUS = 0

SELECT USER_ID AS USER_ID, USER_NAME$lang$ AS USER_NAME, USER_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS USER_DEPTNAME FROM TBL_PMS_MEMBER WHERE PROJECT_ID = #project_Id# AND USER_ID_TYPE = 'user' AND
MEMBER_ROLE_ID = #role_Id#
MEMBER_ROLE_ID IN (1,2)
AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_Id# UNION SELECT CN AS USER_ID, DISPLAYNAME$lang$ AS USER_NAME, DESCRIPTION$lang$ AS USER_DEPTNAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER D JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT B.CN AS DEPARTMENT FROM TBL_PMS_MEMBER A JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER B ON B.DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE CONCAT('%',A.USER_ID,'%') AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.PROJECT_ID = #project_Id# AND A.USER_ID_TYPE = 'dept' AND
MEMBER_ROLE_ID = #role_Id#
MEMBER_ROLE_ID IN (1,2)
AND A.TENANT_ID = 1) C ON D.DEPARTMENT = C.DEPARTMENT WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenant_Id#

select.isEqual: SELECT A.CN AS userId, A.DISPLAYNAME AS userName, A.DISPLAYNAME2 AS userName2, A.TITLE AS userPosition, A.TITLE2 AS userPosition2, B.DISPLAYNAME AS userDeptname, B.DISPLAYNAME2 AS userDeptname2 FROM tbl_usermaster A LEFT JOIN tbl_deptmaster B ON A.department = B.CN AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.CN = #userId#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT CN AS userId, DISPLAYNAME AS userName, DISPLAYNAME2 AS userName2, " " AS userPosition, " " As userPosition2, DISPLAYNAME AS userDeptname, DISPLAYNAME2 AS userDeptname2 FROM tbl_deptmaster WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND CN = #userId#

sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_pms_member ( tenant_id, project_id, member_role_id, user_id, user_name, user_name2, user_deptname, user_deptname2, user_position, user_position2, user_id_type ) VALUES ( #tenantId#, #projectId#, #memberRoleId#, #userId#, #userName#, #userName2#, #userDeptname#, #userDeptname2#, #userPosition#, #userPosition2#, #userIdType# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT remainingWeight, plan_start_date AS projectStartDate, plan_end_date AS projectEndDate, weight_input AS weightInput FROM tbl_pms_project JOIN (SELECT 100 - sum(weight) AS remainingWeight FROM tbl_pms_task WHERE project_id = #project_id#) a WHERE project_id = #project_id#

SELECT p.setting_id as SETTING_ID, u.tenant_id as TENANT_ID, p.user_id as USER_ID, p.view_type as VIEW_TYPE, p.progress_color as PROGRESS_COLOR, p.complete_color as COMPLETE_COLOR, p.overdue_color as OVERDUE_COLOR, p.hold_color as HOLD_COLOR, p.project_sort as PROJECT_SORT, p.list_number as LIST_NUMBER, u.mail as USER_MAIL, u.displayname as USER_NAME, u.displayname2 as USER_NAME2
FROM tbl_usermaster u LEFT JOIN tbl_pms_setting p ON ( u.CN = p.user_id AND u.tenant_id = p.tenant_id )
FROM tbl_deptmaster u LEFT JOIN tbl_pms_setting p ON ( u.CN = p.user_id AND u.tenant_id = p.tenant_id )
WHERE u.CN = #userId# AND u.tenant_id = #tenantId#

SELECT DISTINCT A.PROJECT_ID AS PROJECT_ID, A.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID, A.PROJECT_NAME AS PROJECT_NAME, A.PLAN_START_DATE AS PLAN_START_DATE, A.PLAN_END_DATE AS PLAN_END_DATE, A.REAL_START_DATE AS REAL_START_DATE, A.REAL_END_DATE AS REAL_END_DATE, A.HEAD_MANAGER_ID AS HEAD_MANAGER_ID, A.HEAD_MANAGER_NAME AS HEAD_MANAGER_NAME, A.HEAD_MANAGER_NAME2 AS HEAD_MANAGER_NAME2, A.HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME AS HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME, A.HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME2 AS HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME2, A.STATUS AS STATUS, A.PROGRESS AS PROGRESS, A.OVERVIEW AS OVERVIEW, A.WEIGHT_INPUT AS WEIGHT_INPUT, A.CREATOR_ID AS CREATOR_ID, A.CREATE_DATE AS CREATE_DATE, A.CREATOR_NAME AS CREATOR_NAME, A.CREATOR_NAME2 AS CREATOR_NAME2, A.CREATOR_DEPTNAME AS CREATOR_DEPTNAME, A.CREATOR_DEPTNAME2 AS CREATOR_DEPTNAME2, A.WORKINGDAY AS WORKINGDAY, A.REST_DUEDAY AS REST_DUEDAY, A.ALAM_MAIL_STATUS AS ALAM_MAIL_STATUS FROM tbl_pms_project A JOIN tbl_pms_member B ON A.PROJECT_ID = B.PROJECT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE ( B.USER_ID = #userId# OR B.USER_ID = #deptId# ) AND A.STATUS = #status# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY PLAN_END_DATE DESC
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO tbl_pms_task( tenant_id, project_id, group_id, task_name, status, plan_start_date, plan_end_date, real_progress, weight, overview , member_count, head_manager_id, head_manager_name, head_manager_name2, head_manager_deptname, head_manager_deptname2, writer_id, write_date, writer_name, writer_name2, writer_deptname, writer_deptname2, sort_order, workingday ) VALUES ( #tenantId#, #projectId#, #groupId#, #taskName#, #status#, #planStartDate#, #planEndDate#, #realProgress#, #weight#, #overview#, #memberCount#, #headManagerId#, #headManagerName#, #headManagerName2#, #headManagerDeptname#, #headManagerDeptname2#, #writerId#, #writeDate#, #writerName#, #writerName2#, #writerDeptname#, #writerDeptname2#, #sortOrder#, #workingday# )
SELECT last_insert_id() as id

INSERT INTO tbl_pms_taskmember ( tenant_id, task_id, user_id, user_name, user_name2, user_deptname, user_deptname2, pctinput ) VALUES ( #tenantId#, #taskId#, #userId#, #userName#, #userName2#, #userDeptname#, #userDeptname2#, #pctinput# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_pms_project SET workingday = workingday + #workingday# WHERE project_id = #projectId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT workingday FROM tbl_pms_project WHERE project_id = #projectId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_pms_task SET workingday = #workingday#, weight = #weight# WHERE task_id = #taskId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT MAX(a.sort_order) + 1 FROM (SELECT sort_order FROM tbl_pms_task WHERE group_id = #groupId# UNION SELECT sort_order FROM tbl_pms_group WHERE upper_group_id = #groupId#) a
